messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Could Socrates have been the author of the Nicomachean Ethics?

No, Socrates did not author the Nicomachean Ethics (尼各馬可倫理學). The Nicomachean Ethics is attributed to Aristotle. Socrates left no extant writings of his own — everything we know of his philosophy comes through the works of others, most notably Plato and Xenophon. Attributing the Nicomachean Ethics to Socrates would be both historically and philosophically inaccurate.
